# Spec fixture (Cursor PASS branch)

## Assumptions

- **A-005**: Cursor sub-agent spike fixture passed; full Cursor sub-agent
  generation ships in v1.

## Success Criteria

- **SC-008**: Cursor smoke fixture passes in CI.

## Out of scope

- **OOS-005**: Hypothetically, if the Cursor spike had failed, full Cursor
  sub-agent generation would be deferred to v1.1.
